options.systemMessage: You are a Healthcare Analytics Assistant with access to a SQL Server database called db_ac6bde_healthcaredb. Your job: 1. Understand the user question — it may be in Spanish or English 2. Choose the most appropriate tool to answer it 3. If no existing tool covers the question, use tool_custom_query to run a dynamic SELECT 4. Format the response clearly for Telegram using ONLY HTML: bold, italic, values 5. NEVER use markdown (no asterisks, no underscores, no backticks) === EXACT DATABASE SCHEMA === TABLE: fact_hospitalization (main fact table — one row per hospitalization) hospitalization_id INT IDENTITY PK patient_name NVARCHAR(150) age SMALLINT gender NVARCHAR(10) -- 'Male' or 'Female' blood_type NVARCHAR(5) -- 'A+','A-','B+','B-','AB+','AB-','O+','O-' room_number SMALLINT condition_id INT FK → dim_medical_condition.condition_id medication_id INT FK → dim_medication.medication_id insurer_id INT FK → dim_insurer.insurer_id admission_type_id INT FK → dim_admission_type.admission_type_id result_id INT FK → dim_test_result.result_id doctor_id INT FK → dim_doctor.doctor_id hospital_id INT FK → dim_hospital.hospital_id admission_date_id INT FK → dim_date.date_id discharge_date_id INT FK → dim_date.date_id billing_amount DECIMAL(12,2) -- patient billing in USD length_of_stay SMALLINT -- days between admission and discharge INDEXES ON fact_hospitalization: IX_fact_condition, IX_fact_insurer, IX_fact_admission_date, IX_fact_hospital, IX_fact_admission_type TABLE: dim_medical_condition condition_id INT IDENTITY PK condition_name NVARCHAR(100) UNIQUE Values: 'Cancer', 'Diabetes', 'Obesity', 'Asthma', 'Hypertension', 'Arthritis' TABLE: dim_medication medication_id INT IDENTITY PK medication_name NVARCHAR(100) UNIQUE Values: 'Aspirin', 'Ibuprofen', 'Lipitor', 'Paracetamol', 'Penicillin' TABLE: dim_insurer insurer_id INT IDENTITY PK insurer_name NVARCHAR(100) UNIQUE Values: 'Aetna', 'Blue Cross', 'Cigna', 'Medicare', 'UnitedHealthcare' TABLE: dim_admission_type admission_type_id INT IDENTITY PK admission_type_name NVARCHAR(50) UNIQUE Values: 'Emergency', 'Urgent', 'Elective' TABLE: dim_test_result result_id INT IDENTITY PK result_name NVARCHAR(50) UNIQUE Values: 'Normal', 'Abnormal', 'Inconclusive' TABLE: dim_doctor doctor_id INT IDENTITY PK doctor_name NVARCHAR(150) UNIQUE TABLE: dim_hospital hospital_id INT IDENTITY PK hospital_name NVARCHAR(200) UNIQUE TABLE: dim_date date_id INT PK -- format YYYYMMDD (e.g. 20220315) full_date DATE UNIQUE year SMALLINT quarter TINYINT -- 1 to 4 month TINYINT -- 1 to 12 month_name NVARCHAR(20) -- 'January', 'February', ... week_of_year TINYINT day_of_month TINYINT day_of_week TINYINT -- 1=Monday, 7=Sunday day_name NVARCHAR(20) -- 'Monday', 'Tuesday', ... is_weekend BIT -- 1 if Saturday or Sunday === SQL RULES FOR custom_query TOOL === 1. Always prefix tables: db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.table_name 2. Always JOIN dimension tables — never filter directly by ID columns 3. Add TOP 20 to any query that could return many rows 4. Only SELECT — never INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DROP, ALTER, TRUNCATE, EXEC 5. For percentages: CAST(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER() AS DECIMAL(5,1)) 6. For billing totals: CAST(SUM(billing_amount) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) 7. For averages: CAST(AVG(CAST(column AS FLOAT)) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) 8. To filter by date use: JOIN dim_date d ON f.admission_date_id = d.date_id WHERE d.year = 2022 9. To filter by condition: JOIN dim_medical_condition c ON f.condition_id = c.condition_id WHERE c.condition_name = 'Cancer' === RESPONSE FORMAT RULES === - Start with a bold title that summarizes the answer - Use bullet points with • for multiple rows - Format numbers: billing with $ and commas, percentages with % - Add a brief italic insight at the end - Keep responses under 300 words - If the result is empty, say 'No records found for that filter' - For patient lists: show name, age, gender, condition, insurer, billing, stay days === CRITICAL DATABASE NAME === The database name is ALWAYS: db_ac6bde_healthcaredb NEVER use 'HealthcareDB' — it does not exist and will cause an error. Every query must use: db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.table_name

parameters.query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_admissions,
  CAST(SUM(f.billing_amount) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS total_billing,
  CAST(AVG(f.billing_amount) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS avg_billing,
  CAST(AVG(CAST(f.length_of_stay AS FLOAT)) AS DECIMAL(5,1)) AS avg_stay_days,
  MIN(d.full_date) AS first_admission_date,
  MAX(d.full_date) AS last_admission_date
FROM db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.fact_hospitalization f
JOIN db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_date d ON f.admission_date_id = d.date_id

SELECT
  i.insurer_name,
  COUNT(*) AS admissions,
  CAST(SUM(f.billing_amount) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS total_billing,
  CAST(AVG(f.billing_amount) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS avg_billing
FROM db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.fact_hospitalization f
JOIN db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_insurer i ON f.insurer_id = i.insurer_id
GROUP BY i.insurer_name
ORDER BY total_billing DESC

SELECT
  a.admission_type_name,
  COUNT(*) AS total_admissions,
  CAST(AVG(CAST(f.length_of_stay AS FLOAT)) AS DECIMAL(5,1)) AS avg_stay_days,
  MIN(f.length_of_stay) AS min_days,
  MAX(f.length_of_stay) AS max_days
FROM db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.fact_hospitalization f
JOIN db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_admission_type a ON f.admission_type_id = a.admission_type_id
GROUP BY a.admission_type_name
ORDER BY avg_stay_days DESC

SELECT
  r.result_name,
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  CAST(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER() AS DECIMAL(5,1)) AS percentage
FROM db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.fact_hospitalization f
JOIN db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_test_result r ON f.result_id = r.result_id
GROUP BY r.result_name
ORDER BY total DESC

SELECT TOP 6
  c.condition_name,
  COUNT(*) AS admissions,
  CAST(SUM(f.billing_amount) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS total_billing,
  CAST(AVG(f.billing_amount) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS avg_billing,
  CAST(AVG(CAST(f.length_of_stay AS FLOAT)) AS DECIMAL(5,1)) AS avg_stay_days
FROM db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.fact_hospitalization f
JOIN db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_medical_condition c ON f.condition_id = c.condition_id
GROUP BY c.condition_name
ORDER BY total_billing DESC

SELECT
  r.result_name,
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  CAST(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER() AS DECIMAL(5,1)) AS percentage
FROM db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.fact_hospitalization f
JOIN db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_test_result r ON f.result_id = r.result_id
WHERE r.result_name IN ('Abnormal', 'Inconclusive')
GROUP BY r.result_name
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'Avg billing (Abnormal patients)' AS result_name,
  0 AS total,
  CAST(AVG(CASE WHEN r2.result_name = 'Abnormal' THEN f2.billing_amount END) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS percentage
FROM db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.fact_hospitalization f2
JOIN db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_test_result r2 ON f2.result_id = r2.result_id

SELECT TOP 20
  f.patient_name,
  f.age,
  f.gender,
  f.blood_type,
  c.condition_name,
  i.insurer_name,
  a.admission_type_name,
  r.result_name,
  CAST(f.billing_amount AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS billing_amount,
  f.length_of_stay AS stay_days,
  d.full_date AS admission_date
FROM db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.fact_hospitalization f
JOIN db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_medical_condition c  ON f.condition_id      = c.condition_id
JOIN db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_insurer i            ON f.insurer_id        = i.insurer_id
JOIN db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_admission_type a     ON f.admission_type_id = a.admission_type_id
JOIN db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_test_result r        ON f.result_id         = r.result_id
JOIN db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_date d               ON f.admission_date_id = d.date_id
ORDER BY f.hospitalization_id DESC

{{ $fromAI('query', 'Write a valid T-SQL SELECT query that answers the user question. IMPORTANT: always use db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.table_name — NEVER use HealthcareDB. Always JOIN dimension tables. Add TOP 20 to any query that could return many rows. Return only the SQL query, no explanations.') }}

DECLARE @condition_id      INT
DECLARE @medication_id     INT
DECLARE @insurer_id        INT
DECLARE @admission_type_id INT
DECLARE @result_id         INT
DECLARE @doctor_id         INT
DECLARE @hospital_id       INT
DECLARE @admission_date_id INT
DECLARE @discharge_date_id INT

SELECT @condition_id      = condition_id      FROM db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_medical_condition WHERE condition_name      = '{{ $json.cond }}'
SELECT @medication_id     = medication_id     FROM db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_medication        WHERE medication_name     = '{{ $json.med }}'
SELECT @insurer_id        = insurer_id        FROM db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_insurer           WHERE insurer_name        = '{{ $json.insurer }}'
SELECT @admission_type_id = admission_type_id FROM db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_admission_type   WHERE admission_type_name = '{{ $json.admType }}'
SELECT @result_id         = result_id         FROM db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_test_result       WHERE result_name         = '{{ $json.result }}'
SELECT @admission_date_id = date_id           FROM db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_date              WHERE date_id             = {{ $json.admDateId }}
SELECT @discharge_date_id = date_id           FROM db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_date              WHERE date_id             = {{ $json.disDateId }}

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_doctor   WHERE doctor_name   = '{{ $json.doctor }}')
    INSERT INTO db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_doctor   (doctor_name)   VALUES ('{{ $json.doctor }}')
SELECT @doctor_id   = doctor_id   FROM db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_doctor   WHERE doctor_name   = '{{ $json.doctor }}'

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_hospital WHERE hospital_name = '{{ $json.hospital }}')
    INSERT INTO db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_hospital (hospital_name) VALUES ('{{ $json.hospital }}')
SELECT @hospital_id = hospital_id FROM db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.dim_hospital WHERE hospital_name = '{{ $json.hospital }}'

SELECT
  ISNULL(@condition_id,      -1) AS condition_id,
  ISNULL(@medication_id,     -1) AS medication_id,
  ISNULL(@insurer_id,        -1) AS insurer_id,
  ISNULL(@admission_type_id, -1) AS admission_type_id,
  ISNULL(@result_id,         -1) AS result_id,
  ISNULL(@doctor_id,         -1) AS doctor_id,
  ISNULL(@hospital_id,       -1) AS hospital_id,
  ISNULL(@admission_date_id, -1) AS admission_date_id,
  ISNULL(@discharge_date_id, -1) AS discharge_date_id

parameters.jsCode:
const r = $input.first().json;
const v = $('Validate Fields1').first().json;

const checks = [
  [r.condition_id,      'Medical condition not found: ' + v.cond],
  [r.medication_id,     'Medication not found: ' + v.med],
  [r.insurer_id,        'Insurance provider not found: ' + v.insurer],
  [r.admission_type_id, 'Admission type not found: ' + v.admType],
  [r.result_id,         'Test result not found: ' + v.result],
  [r.doctor_id,         'Doctor could not be resolved: ' + v.doctor],
  [r.hospital_id,       'Hospital could not be resolved: ' + v.hospital],
  [r.admission_date_id, 'Admission date ' + v.admDate + ' (id: ' + v.admDateId + ') not found in calendar. Allowed range: 2019-01-01 to 2024-12-31.'],
  [r.discharge_date_id, 'Discharge date ' + v.disDate + ' (id: ' + v.disDateId + ') not found in calendar. Allowed range: 2019-01-01 to 2024-12-31.'],
];

for (const [id, msg] of checks) {
  if (id === -1) throw new Error(msg);
}

return [{ json: {
  condition_id:      r.condition_id,
  medication_id:     r.medication_id,
  insurer_id:        r.insurer_id,
  admission_type_id: r.admission_type_id,
  result_id:         r.result_id,
  doctor_id:         r.doctor_id,
  hospital_id:       r.hospital_id,
  admission_date_id: r.admission_date_id,
  discharge_date_id: r.discharge_date_id,
  name:     v.name,
  age:      v.age,
  gender:   v.gender,
  blood:    v.blood,
  room:     v.room,
  billing:  v.billing,
  lengthOfStay: v.lengthOfStay
} }];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO db_ac6bde_healthcaredb.dbo.fact_hospitalization (
  patient_name, age, gender, blood_type, room_number,
  condition_id, medication_id, insurer_id, admission_type_id,
  result_id, doctor_id, hospital_id,
  admission_date_id, discharge_date_id,
  billing_amount, length_of_stay
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.name }}',
  {{ $json.age }},
  '{{ $json.gender }}',
  '{{ $json.blood }}',
  {{ $json.room }},
  {{ $json.condition_id }},
  {{ $json.medication_id }},
  {{ $json.insurer_id }},
  {{ $json.admission_type_id }},
  {{ $json.result_id }},
  {{ $json.doctor_id }},
  {{ $json.hospital_id }},
  {{ $json.admission_date_id }},
  {{ $json.discharge_date_id }},
  {{ $json.billing }},
  {{ $json.lengthOfStay }}
)

SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY() AS new_hospitalization_id
